title: FAQ — Anybuild
description: Frequently asked questions about Anybuild, Onedb Smartsuite, platform architecture, security, and operations.

hero.copyHtml: Answers to common questions about product scope, architecture, security, operations, and commercial terms.

faqItems.question: What is Anybuild?
faqItems.answer: Anybuild is a model-driven platform for building and evolving business software systems with shared structure, workflows, and governance.

faqItems.question: What is Onedb?
faqItems.answer: Onedb is the company behind Anybuild and Onedb Smartsuite, with practical ERP and CRM experience in production environments.

faqItems.question: What can I build with Anybuild?
faqItems.answer: You can build custom business applications, internal tools, operational systems, and reusable domain solutions on one platform foundation.

faqItems.question: Do I need Coding skills to use Anybuild?
faqItems.answer: No. You can build through visual and guided workflows, and add code only when you need deeper customization.

faqItems.question: How do I publish my App?
faqItems.answer: Applications are deployed through Anybuild runtime environments with built-in infrastructure, security, and lifecycle management.

faqItems.question: How does Anybuild compare to Vibe coding tools like Lovable, Bolt, Replit etc?
faqItems.answer: Anybuild focuses on governed, long-lived business systems with structured models and runtime consistency, not only rapid prototype generation.

faqItems.question: How does Anybuild compare to AI tools like Cursor, Claude Code, Codex etc?
faqItems.answer: Those tools help write code; Anybuild provides the system layer and execution model where applications are defined, run, and evolved.

faqItems.question: How does Anybuild compare to No-Code tools such as Bubble, Airtable, Power Apps etc?
faqItems.answer: Anybuild is built for complex business systems with stronger model structure, integrated workflows, and production-grade operational boundaries.

faqItems.question: How does Anybuild compare to Low-Code tools such as OutSystems, Mendix, Appian etc?
faqItems.answer: Anybuild combines model-driven design with integrated runtime capabilities and focuses on reusable system architecture with lower operational overhead.

faqItems.question: How does Anybuild compare to Traditional Programming?
faqItems.answer: Traditional programming offers full flexibility but higher effort for foundations. Anybuild gives a governed base and faster delivery for business systems.

faqItems.question: How does Anybuild compare to Packaged Software like Dynamics, Salesforce, Zero etc?
faqItems.answer: Packaged software optimizes for fixed product boundaries. Anybuild optimizes for custom and evolving system design while preserving structure.

faqItems.question: How does Anybuild compare to Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets?
faqItems.answer: Spreadsheets are flexible but fragile at scale. Anybuild adds structured data models, workflows, security, and auditable runtime behavior.

faqItems.question: Is No-Code only useful for Basic Applications?
faqItems.answer: No. With the right system architecture and governance, no-code and model-driven methods can support advanced operational applications.

faqItems.question: Will AI coding tools replace No-Code and Low-Code tools?
faqItems.answer: AI improves software creation speed, but structured platforms remain essential for consistency, lifecycle control, and maintainable business systems.

faqItems.question: Is Anybuild suitable for Startups?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Teams can launch quickly with lower setup overhead and evolve products without rebuilding core system foundations.

faqItems.question: Is Onedb ERP and CRM suitable for SMEs?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Onedb Smartsuite supports practical SME operations with integrated ERP and CRM capabilities in one system model.

faqItems.question: Is Anybuild suitable for Enterprises?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Anybuild supports enterprise-grade security, governance, integrations, and scalable runtime patterns for larger organizations.

faqItems.question: How can Anybuild Development to be 25X Faster?
faqItems.answer: Speed comes from model reuse, generated foundations, integrated workflows, and fewer repetitive setup tasks across projects.

faqItems.question: What is the Architecture for Anybuild?
faqItems.answer: Anybuild uses a model-driven architecture where data, workflows, UI, reporting, and security are aligned through shared definitions.

faqItems.question: How Secure is Anybuild?
faqItems.answer: Security includes built-in access control and extendable domain rules. Additional controls depend on deployment model and customer requirements.

faqItems.question: Can Anybuild Scale?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Scale depends on selected plan and environment model, with options for higher throughput and dedicated capacity.

faqItems.question: Does Anybuild run on Mobile?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Applications can be accessed on mobile devices through responsive interfaces and supported deployment configurations.

faqItems.question: Is Anybuild available On-Premise?
faqItems.answer: Deployment options depend on plan and agreement. Contact the team for current on-premise or isolated environment availability.

faqItems.question: Is Anybuild Cross Platform, Does it run on Mac?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Anybuild is accessed through standard web technologies and supports cross-platform usage including macOS.

faqItems.question: Is my Data safe, regularly backed up?
faqItems.answer: Data protection and backup policies depend on selected environment and service configuration. Production plans include operational safeguards.

faqItems.question: Can I easily cancel my plan?
faqItems.answer: Plan and cancellation terms are defined in your subscription agreement and applicable terms.

faqItems.question: Can I use Anybuild for free?
faqItems.answer: Yes. A free or trial option is available for initial evaluation and early exploration.

faqItems.question: Can I monetize my Application?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can build and commercialize applications according to your business model and agreement terms.

faqItems.question: Who owns the IP of my Application?
faqItems.answer: IP ownership is governed by your agreement and applicable terms. Your application logic and domain design remain your key assets.

faqItems.question: Can I monetize my IP?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Partners and builders can package and monetize reusable capabilities, subject to agreed commercial terms.

faqItems.question: Can I easily Import and Export Data?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Anybuild supports data import/export workflows and integration patterns for operational interoperability.

faqItems.question: Can I integrate Anybuild with other systems?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Integration is supported through APIs, workflows, connectors, and external service calls.

faqItems.question: Can I move Functionality to another System?
faqItems.answer: Functionality can be refactored and migrated depending on architecture choices and integration boundaries.

faqItems.question: Can I move my Application away from the Anybuild platform?
faqItems.answer: Migration approaches depend on system design and terms. Plan portability requirements early for best outcomes.

faqItems.question: Is Anybuild GDPR Compliant?
faqItems.answer: GDPR support is provided through platform controls and operational practices. Compliance also depends on customer implementation and usage.
